name: Dining Chairs
description: Client (f/43) residing in a 2-room HDB rental flat with her husband and four school-going children is seeking a donation of dining chairs. The current chairs in the household are worn out and broken. The husband is the sole breadwinner, while the client is not working due to her health issues and caregiving responsibilities for her children. Thank you.

name: Single Mattress
description:
Please contact Social Worker @ 9699 3764

Family of 5, eldest child is currently in NS, the other 2 are PWDs in SPED schools. Father is in-between jobs and mother is a full time caregiver for the youngest child. 

Parents and youngest child share a single mattress. The current mattress is quite unsanitary and poses hygiene risk to the child.

name: Bed
description:
We are reaching out on behalf of a 62-year-old single elderly man who is currently living alone in a rental flat.

He has been suffering from a severe bedbug infestation, which has greatly affected his ability to rest and maintain his well-being. Due to ongoing health issues, he is medically unfit to work and has no stable source of income, making it impossible for him to afford a new bed on his own.

We are humbly appealing to kind-hearted individuals for the donation of a single bed frame and mattress, so he can have a clean and comfortable place to sleep and improve his quality of life. If you are able to assist or would like more information, please feel free to reach out via Whatsapp 89118058 or email:hsinyu_lee@viriya.org.sg

name: Bicycle
description:
The family is seeking assistance to obtain a second-hand bicycle for their 13-year-old son, who requires a reliable way to travel to school. He is approximately 1.6–1.7m tall, and a suitably sized bicycle is important for his safety and comfort. With a household income of $1.9k, the family prioritises essential expenses and is unable to afford a bicycle.

A second-hand bicycle would provide him with a practical and independent means of commuting and support his school attendance.
